_comment: Account UUIDs are not guessable — they come from Nordnet's UI URL or
from the first capture run's XHR response (raw.positions[*].accountId).
The `url` field is the Nordnet page the capture script navigates to in
order to bootstrap a session and harvest a Bearer token. The default
below works for most setups; replace if your Nordnet flow differs.
Each tenant maps to one entry in the dataScraper `tenants` table —
use `npm run seed -- <tenantId> '<label>'` on the server first.
